features.description: Background sessions now canonicalize symlinked working dirs so they can no longer escape their workspace folder
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed background session isolation not canonicalizing symlinked working directories, which could let sessions escape their workspace folder

features.description: Managed OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT now governs all signals; signal-specific overrides can't redirect telemetry away
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed managed settings that set `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` not governing all signals — lower-scope signal-specific overrides no longer redirect telemetry away from the managed endpoint

features.description: Brace expansion in CLAUDE.md/SKILL.md paths frontmatter is now budget-bounded to prevent startup OOM/stalls
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed a `CLAUDE.md` or `SKILL.md` paths frontmatter value with many brace groups OOM-killing or stalling the CLI at startup — brace expansion is now budget-bounded

features.description: Concurrent subagents now capped (default 20) via CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONCURRENT_SUBAGENTS to stop unbounded fan-out
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a cap on concurrently-running subagents (default 20, override with `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONCURRENT_SUBAGENTS`) so one message can't fan out unbounded background agents

features.description: Subagents no longer spawn nested subagents by default; set CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_SUBAGENT_SPAWN_DEPTH to allow nesting
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed subagents to no longer spawn nested subagents by default; set `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_SUBAGENT_SPAWN_DEPTH` to allow deeper nesting

features.description: --max-budget-usd now denies new spawns and halts running background subagents once the cap is reached
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `--max-budget-usd` not stopping background subagents: once the cap is reached, new spawns are denied and running background agents are halted

features.description: Resumed background agent sessions now restore the agent's prompt and tool restrictions instead of reverting to default
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed resumed background agent sessions reverting to the default agent: the agent's prompt and tool restrictions are now restored

features.description: Worktree-isolated subagents can no longer redirect git into the shared checkout via git flags or env vars
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed worktree-isolated subagents redirecting git into the shared checkout via `git -C`, `--git-dir`, or `GIT_DIR`/`GIT_WORK_TREE`

features.description: Bash permission checking now handles compound statements with redirects inside && lists or negations
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Bash command permission checking for compound statements with redirects inside `&&` lists or negations

features.description: Workflow/scheduled-task writes no longer follow a .claude symlink that could redirect writes outside the project
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed workflow saves and scheduled-task writes following a symlink at `.claude`, which could redirect writes outside the project

features.description: Bash command parsing of non-ASCII characters now matches real shell word boundaries used for permission checks
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Bash command parsing of non-ASCII characters to match real shell word boundaries

features.description: /rewind no longer restores or deletes files through symlinks or hard links at tracked paths and reports skips
features.reference_changelog_line: `/rewind` no longer restores or deletes files through symlinks or hard links at tracked paths and reports how many paths it skipped

features.description: New `sandbox.filesystem.disabled` setting skips filesystem isolation while keeping network egress control
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `sandbox.filesystem.disabled` setting to skip filesystem isolation while keeping network egress control
